calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Jeannette Lau is present.
Jonathan Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants Lavinia Jackson & Damiel Hatfield are present.
Erin Dougherty representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on ***

This case settled, the trial date of April 20, 2009 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, Clerks Maria Olopernes-Pena/Dennis Vegas, Not Reported. (218)
